zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Basset於大約1095年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾可爾斯東 巴塞特時，他的父親Sir Ralph Basset Justicar22歲，母親Alice de Buci22歲。他於1123年與Matilda Ridel在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1144年在英國貝德福爾瑟利享年51歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Basset was born about 1095, in Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, was 22 and his mother, Alice de Buci, was 22. He married Matilda Ridel in 1123, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1144, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Basset est né environ 1095, à Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice de Buci, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Ridel en 1123, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1144, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Basset è nato il circa 1095 nel Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Buci, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Ridel nel 1123, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1144, nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Bassetが約1095年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアコルストン バセットで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Basset Justicarは22歳，母Alice de Buciは22歳であった。1123年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでMatilda Ridelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1144年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで51歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットにて埋葬された。

ko.Abingdon-on-Thames, Vale of White Horse,: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Basset(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 노틴그함실르 콜스턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Basset Justicar(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Buci(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Matilda Ridel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1144년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Buci, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Ridel em 1123, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1144, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Abingdon-on-Thames, Vale of White Horse,: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Basset родился около 1095 г. в местности колстон бассетт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Basset Justicar было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Buci, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Ridel в 1123 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1144 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Basset nació aproximadamente 1095, en Colston Bassett, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Basset Justicar, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice de Buci, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Matilda Ridel en 1123, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1144, en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
